ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing unit */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the housing unit */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the housing unit */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the housing units in the area */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the housing units */,
  "total_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bedrooms in the housing units */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the area */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the area */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the area */,
  "ocean_proximity" TEXT /* Proximity to the ocean (e.g., NEAR BAY, <1H OCEAN, INLAND) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the data was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the record has been logically deleted */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the housing unit is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the housing unit is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the housing unit */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the housing unit */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, condominium) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "num_stories" INTEGER /* Number of stories in the property */,
  "garage_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces available */,
  "median_house_value" REAL /* Median house value in the area */,
  "median_rent" REAL /* Median rent in the area */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the area */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population in the area (e.g., High School, Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., Validated, Pending, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Data Analyst, Property Manager, Executive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table on which the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "data_before" TEXT /* Data before the action */,
  "data_after" TEXT /* Data after the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
